creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
With the patch, expected output:
$ tree -F
.
└── graphics/
    └── darktable/
        ├── distinfo
        ├── files/
        │   ├── patch-data_kernels_CMakeLists.txt
        │   ├── patch-src_CMakeLists.txt
        │   └── patch-src_external_rawspeed_cmake_Modules_CheckZLIB.cmake
        ├── Makefile
        ├── pkg-descr
        └── pkg-plist
